category_sources: Official Vite guide describes it as a build tool for a faster and leaner development experience for modern web projects.
source_facts.description says Vite is next-generation frontend tooling.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and guide use Vite capitalization.
docs_sources: Official current Vite site is vite.dev, and the guide is the primary documentation path.
source_facts.homepage points to vitejs.dev, which now directs users to vite.dev for current docs.
repo_sources: Official Vite guide identifies the repo URL as https://github.com/vitejs/vite.git.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was determined from the official Vite guide clone instructions.
tags_sources: Official Vite guide describes a dev server, build command, TypeScript support, plugin API, and modern web project workflow.
